title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Costco India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Costco India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Costco India in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costco India:
Costco India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
